instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is ethan_martin_2396 and you are contacting to complain about your delayed flight HAT039 from ATL to SEA. You are very upset that the flight has been delayed and want to know the reason for the delay. You also want the airline to compensate you for the delay. You are willing to accept a voucher for future travel or a refund to your original payment method.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: complain about your delayed flight HAT039

hints.hint: The flight was from ATL to SEA

hints.segment: want to know the reason for the delay
hints.hint: Could you tell me the reason for the delay?

hints.segment: want the airline to compensate you for the delay
hints.hint: I would like to be compensated for the delay

hints.segment: willing to accept a voucher for future travel or a refund to your original payment method
hints.hint: I'm willing to accept either a voucher for future travel or a refund to my original payment method
